{"id":"project-LICHEN-v35c","title":"router.py: DtnMessage.size uses hardcoded 100-byte overhead estimate","description":"file: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py:128-130

DtnMessage.size() returns len(self.packet.payload) + 100, using a hardcoded 100-byte overhead estimate. This approximation could cause:

1. Buffer under-utilization if actual overhead is less
2. Unexpected eviction behavior if actual overhead varies significantly

Similar to project-LICHEN-7exy (Rust version). Should either:
- Calculate actual size from IPv6 header + extension headers + transport overhead
- Or document the approximation tolerance and ensure it's conservative","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:02:54.773571Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:02:54.77361Z"}

- Or document the approximation tolerance and ensure it's conservative","status":"in_progress","priority":4,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:02:54.773571Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-23T04:22:22.011576601Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T04:22:22.011576601Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T04:27:22.011576601Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T04:22:22.011576601Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-v35c","title":"router.py: DtnMessage.size uses hardcoded 100-byte overhead estimate","description":"file: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py:128-130

DtnMessage.size() returns len(self.packet.payload) + 100, using a hardcoded 100-byte overhead estimate. This approximation could cause:

1. Buffer under-utilization if actual overhead is less
2. Unexpected eviction behavior if actual overhead varies significantly

Similar to project-LICHEN-7exy (Rust version). Should either:
- Calculate actual size from IPv6 header + extension headers + transport overhead
